name: @ryu/skill-editor-app
description: The Ryu Skill Editor app: author a user-owned Agent Skill (SKILL.md) — front-matter form fields (name/description/allowed tools/always-on), a lightweight write/preview markdown body editor, debounced autosave, and server-backed undoable version history — shipped as a full-page Companion (Path B, ui_format:"html"). CRUD over Core's `/api/skills` authoring endpoints through the skills:crud bridge capability; built to one self-contained HTML via vite-plugin-singlefile. Consumes @ryu/ui components (tree-shaken into the single-file bundle). The shared Plate/Yjs MarkdownEditor is shell-bound and cannot cross the sandbox, so the body editor is a self-contained textarea + rendered preview (SKILL.md is plain markdown).
